title: Han river evenings — soft light and quiet trains.
summary: A small series of images from evening walks along the Han river, watching light shift over trains, bridges, and water.
body: Light changes quickly at the river. Trains cut across the frame, bridges hold the horizon, and people drift in and out of view.
This entry collects a short sequence of images and notes from those evenings, kept together as one quiet story.

title: Kitchen window mornings.
summary: Photographs and notes from mornings spent near the kitchen window: steam, plants, coffee, and passing weather.
